name: Upwarp
author: Poki
description: Upwarp is a platform puzzle game where you carry a portal above your head and use it to solve tricky challenges! Move through each level by warping yourself onto higher platforms, collecting plus and minus power-ups to adjust the height of your portal. Think smart, plan your moves, and find the perfect path to reach your destination. Ready to warp your way to victory? How to play Upwarp? Warp: W or the up arrow key Move: ASD or the left/right/down arrow key Reset: R Back: Esc Who created Upwarp? Upwarp is created by Robert Alvarez. They have other thinking games on Poki : Two Button Bounce , Return Portal , Blockins , One Button Bounce , Ledge Throw , Platform Countdown , Hop Warp , Plactions , Jumping Clones , Big Tall Small , Teleport Jumper , Block Toggle , Isotiles , Chessformer , Sides of Gravity , Resizer , Jumpossess , Portal Pusher , Grapple Grip and Time Clones ! How can I play Upwarp for free? You can play Upwarp for free on Poki. Can I play Upwarp on mobile devices and desktop? Upwarp can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
